A two-seater [[Rho-1 Limulus-class courier/Legends|Rho-1 Limulus-class courier]] took [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]], and was a design commonly used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="Quest" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''
*[[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]]
